name: to-do
description: Date-routed daily to-do notes feeding SpaceDailyDashboard's tasks panel under beacon/to-do/. v0.1.2: filename pattern <Name>-YYYY-MM-DD (filename_prefix "ToDo-") per v0.4.2 platform invariant.

post_install.message: To-do blueprint installed at beacon/to-do/. REQUIRED: enable the Templater community plugin if not already enabled. Click '+ Today's To-Do' in the nav-button row to create today's file at beacon/to-do/YYYY/MM-MMMM/YYYY-MM-DD-ToDo.md. Manual file creation in beacon/to-do/ now also auto-applies the template (via Templater folder-template registration). Tasks added in today's file appear in the daily dashboard's Today's Tasks panel.
